title: Intensely Braised Slovakian Chicken Braised
description: A hearty, salt-forward Slovakian dish featuring chicken thighs in a rich braise, made using a bamboo steamer for a unique texture. This braised chicken is a great option for a weeknight meal, and is macrobiotic-friendly.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons caraway seeds
ingredients.notes: available at most well-stocked grocery stores or online

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a large clai in a bamboo steamer over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken thighs and brown on all sides, 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the chicken to the steamer basket of the bamboo steamer, in a single layer, skin side up.
Cover with a clean towel and place over boiling water in a large pot.
